'''Yun''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], and member of the [[Des'maric Pirates]]. One of [[Miktiss]]' trusted lieutenants, Yun commanded one of the group's three [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]].
